top_signals.title: Taihan Takes Delivery of Second Cable Laying Vessel
top_signals.summary: Taihan Cable & Solution has taken delivery of its second cable laying vessel (CLV) Skandi Connector, strengthening its offshore wind and subsea power cable installation capabilities.Skandi Connector CLV, delivered by DOF Group, joins Taihan’s…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
